narrative:
Harrison Township (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,014 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.8 percentage points.
